subcodes.first_line: O ye steadfast lovers of the Abhá Beauty! Four hundred blessed souls from among the friends of the West have, with one accord, this letter [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای احبای با وفای جمال ابهی چهار صد نفس مبارک از دوستان غرب بالاتفاق این نامه
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @unity; oneness of humanity, @call to action, @obedience to and respect for government authority, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
